meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Solve Debugging
content.seo_description: Master the Antigravity project template to eliminate debugging bottlenecks. An intermediate guide for freelancers using Claude Code to ship faster.
content.answer_block: Stop wrestling with opaque bugs by implementing the Antigravity project template. By standardizing your architecture and leveraging Claude Code’s autonomous diagnostic capabilities, you transform debugging from a manual crawl into an automated, systematic process. This workflow ensures you ship production-ready code while maintaining high velocity for your clients.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and you are staring at a stack trace that looks like a cryptic ancient language. Debugging isn't just a technical hurdle; it is a profit-killer that drains your billable hours and sanity. When code becomes a black box, your ability to scale as a freelancer hits an immediate, painful ceiling.

But what if you could invert the debugging paradigm? By adopting the Antigravity project template, you move from reactive troubleshooting to proactive architectural integrity. This is the difference between a developer who struggles to maintain a single app and a lead architect who manages multiple high-performing projects with ease.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the standardized directory structure that forces modularity, making it impossible for spaghetti code to hide.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize an Antigravity project structure with strict separation of concerns, focusing on domain-driven design and modular controller patterns.

steps.title: Integrate Claude Code for Diagnostic Monitoring
steps.description: Connect Claude Code to your project workspace to enable real-time observability of your logic flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the project environment to allow Claude Code to read logs and identify runtime exceptions automatically.

steps.title: Automate Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Use the template to generate tests that act as guardrails, catching regressions before they become client-facing bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan the current business logic files and generate comprehensive unit tests using the Antigravity testing utility pattern.

steps.title: Implement Root Cause Analysis (RCA) Hooks
steps.description: Embed diagnostic hooks into the template that feed context directly to Claude Code when an error occurs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Insert error-handling middleware that logs full stack trace context in a format optimized for Claude Code analysis.

steps.title: Continuous Refactoring Loop
steps.description: Run iterative refactoring sessions to simplify complex functions that are prone to hidden state issues.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze identified 'hot' functions for cyclomatic complexity and refactor them into smaller, testable, stateless units.

pro_tips: Always define a 'Golden Path' test suite in your template to ensure core business logic remains untouched during rapid iteration.
Use Claude Code to create 'diff-only' commits; it prevents accidental breaking changes when you're working under tight deadlines.
Map your error logs to a local SQLite database within the Antigravity project to allow AI to query historical bug patterns.
Treat your configuration files as code; version control your environment variables to avoid the 'works on my machine' syndrome.
Automate your documentation generation using Claude Code immediately after every successful refactor to keep the client updated without manual effort.
content.next_steps: Once your project is stable, focus on setting up a CI/CD pipeline that triggers the Claude Code analysis on every pull request to ensure zero-regression deployments.
content.conversion_block: Stop losing hours to manual debugging and start delivering high-quality, bug-free applications that keep your clients coming back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
